steps.title: Find the logical clue
steps.content: The sentence before the blank says the USGS omitted important considerations, especially the earth’s curvature, which implies its earlier determination is flawed.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content: Hence, signals a conclusion that follows from the omitted considerations, showing the USGS‑determined center was inaccurate. The other three choices either merely indicate sequence or contrast and do not express the cause‑effect relationship. That matches choice C — C is correct.
